prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-12X36IGMMSBM-12X36-GRY-SM-2-FBA Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Grey Miners Moss Sluice Box Matting Mining Equipment for Gold Prospecting, Unbacked 10mm, 12 x 36 inch Description: The ASR Outdoor Gold Prospecting Miners Moss Sluice Box Matting makes your gold panning recovery efforts simple, easy, and effortless; maximizing your trapped gold and helping to remove unwanted debris that is washed through your sluice box or dredging operation. With the ASR Outdoor Sluice Box Miners Moss you'll surely increase your gold prospecting recovery efforts.

The ASR Outdoor Miners Moss Sluice Box Matting is an un-backed, extruded woven vinyl mesh arranged in a random loop pattern, sometimes referred to as noodle loop or spaghetti cushion gold prospecting matting. It is widely considered the best material for trapping gold flake and gold nuggets while removing unwanted sediment processed through the washout of your sluicing, dredger or high-banking gold prospecting efforts. The woven vinyl loop material contains thousands of gold traps throughout the entire length of the Miners Moss Sluice Box Matting. Gold pickers, fine gold and heavy black sands will simply get stuck in the material helping increase your gold prospecting recovery efforts.

Each roll of ASR Outdoor Gold Prospecting Miners Moss is 10mm thick, which will fit most standard sluice boxes, and comes in 3 size and color options. You can even cut it down to size if need be, as it can be cut easily in any direction, across the grain or lengthwise, giving it a universal fit for whichever sluice box you may be using. Make sure to grab a roll of this sluice box matting before your next gold prospecting adventure.

To clean ASR Outdoor Gold Prospecting Miners Moss Matting, simply shake out or hose off, and reuse. Search Terms: sluce box mat woven vinyl paydirt classifying gold pan equipment panning kit for adults dredge mining equipment tools prospector mining panning prospecting sifting tools sluice classifier screen set gem collecting hock hounding adventure mineral Features: - GOLD RECOVERY SLUICE BOX MATTING: Miners moss sluice box matting is the preferred choice of gold prospectors in their sluice boxes, dredges and high banker gold prosecting operations - THOUSAND OF GOLD TRAPS: Catch gold nuggets, pickers and even some finer gold throughout the entire length of the woven vinyl miners moss; it really works helping to increase the efficiency and over all yield in your gold panning and prospecting recovery efforts - UNIVERSAL FIT FOR SLUICE BOXES: Can be cut down to size as needed with a scissor or knife; available in different sizes and colors; sluice matting thickness: 10mm (.39") - MATERIAL AND DESIGN: Miners moss is an un-backed, extruded woven vinyl mesh arranged in a random loop pattern, sometimes referred to as noodle loop or spaghetti cushion gold prospecting sluice matting - WASH, RINSE, REUSE, REPEAT: The clean up process has never been easier. Made to be durable and long lasting the ASR Outdoor miners moss sluice box matting is designed to be reused. Simply hose down and shake out in a 5 gallon bucket; its that simple === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 12x36 Grey Miners Moss Sluice Box Matting
